overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a foggy historic New Orleans-style city district in winter. The player traverses wrought-iron balconies, descends interior stairs, and walks through muddy streets lined with 19th-century storefronts while light snow falls.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated wooden balcony toward a green-shuttered doorway, passing large potted ferns

notable_agents.action: woman standing on adjacent balcony looking over the wrought-iron railing

entered.detail: ornate black wrought-iron railing with decorative patterns lining the wooden balcony
large green potted fern sitting on the balcony deck
weathered building facade with green wooden shutters and peeling paint
intricate cast iron decorative elements on the exterior of the historic building

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated wooden balcony with ornate wrought-iron railings in a foggy historic district. Large ferns sit in pots on the balcony while an NPC stands on an adjacent balcony. The camera moves steadily toward a green-shuttered doorway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior stairwell with exposed brick walls

events.description: enters building through green-shuttered doorway from the balcony
light dims significantly entering the narrow interior stairwell

agents.ego_description: descending a narrow wooden staircase with brick walls, passing a woman holding a lantern on the landing

notable_agents.action: woman holding a lantern standing against the brick wall on the stair landing

entered.detail: narrow wooden stairs with worn steps descending between brick walls
aged red brick wall with visible mortar and weathering
simple wooden handrail along the left side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: Entering the building through the green doorway and descending a narrow wooden staircase surrounded by exposed brick walls. The lighting shifts to dim interior illumination as the camera passes a woman holding a lantern, continuing down to the ground floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor courtyard and passage leading to main street

events.description: exits stairwell into ground floor courtyard with brick paving
passes through arched doorway onto the muddy street

agents.ego_description: walking through the ground floor courtyard and narrow passage, emerging onto the muddy street

notable_agents.action: man in vest and hat walking across the brick courtyard
man in suit standing in the arched doorway ahead

entered.detail: ground floor courtyard with herringbone brick paving pattern
large weathered wooden double doors with metal hinges
narrow arched corridor with red plaster walls leading to the street
muddy unpaved street visible through the archway ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairwell into a brick-paved courtyard with weathered wooden doors, then passing through a narrow arched passage with red walls to emerge onto a muddy historic street lined with storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with muddy road and wooden sidewalks

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the muddy street past various storefronts and NPCs, approaching the edge of the commercial district

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the muddy street
man leaning against the building wall near the insurance office

entered.detail: two-story yellow building with green shutters and pharmacy signage
red and white striped barber pole outside a storefront
hanging sign reading INSURANCE AGENTS above a doorway
green hanging sign with gold lettering for Campbell business
wooden covered sidewalk attached to the brick building

segments.scene_description: Walking along the muddy main street past historic storefronts including a yellow pharmacy and insurance agency. The street is lined with wooden sidewalks and utility poles. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left as the camera continues toward a covered walkway at the foggy edge of town.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated historic balcony, descending through a dim interior to emerge onto a muddy, fog-shrouded street. It begins by gliding along a wooden balcony past ornate wrought-iron railings and potted ferns toward a green-shuttered doorway. As the camera enters the building, the scene shifts to a dim interior where it descends a narrow wooden staircase flanked by exposed brick walls and a woman holding a lantern. The movement then carries the viewer through a brick-paved courtyard and a narrow red-walled arched passage, finally opening up onto a muddy main street lined with wooden sidewalks and historic storefronts. The journey concludes as the camera passes a horse-drawn carriage and a yellow pharmacy, moving steadily toward a covered walkway at the foggy edge of town.
